records.question: Which matches on 2011-04-28 had a win margin of at least 17.0 and featured a man of the match from India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN player ON match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id
JOIN country ON player.country_name = country.country_id
JOIN country AS country__1 ON country.country_id = country__1.country_id
WHERE country.country_name = 'India' AND match.win_margin >= 17.0 AND match.match_date = '2011-04-28'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Match.Match_Id
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON Match.Man_of_the_Match = Player.Player_Id
JOIN Country ON Player.Country_Name = Country.Country_Id
WHERE Match.Match_Date = '2011-04-28'
  AND Match.Win_Margin >= 17.0
  AND Country.Country_Name = 'India'

records.question: What matches played at Wankhede Stadium since 2012 had a win margin of at least 6, with seasons where the man of the series scored at least 315, the purple cap was at least 190, and the orange cap was at least 162?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.man_of_the_series >= 315 AND season.purple_cap >= 190 AND season.orange_cap >= 162 AND season.season_year >= 2012 AND match.win_margin >= 6.0 AND venue.venue_name = 'Wankhede Stadium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.Match_Id
FROM Match m
JOIN Venue v ON m.Venue_Id = v.Venue_Id
JOIN Season s ON m.Season_Id = s.Season_Id
JOIN Player p ON s.Man_of_the_Series = p.Player_Id
WHERE v.Venue_Name = 'Wankhede Stadium'
  AND m.Match_Date >= '2012-01-01'
  AND m.Win_Margin >= 6
  AND p.Player_Id = s.Man_of_the_Series
  AND s.Man_of_the_Series IS NOT NULL
  AND s.Purple_Cap >= 190
  AND s.Orange_Cap >= 162
  AND (
    SELECT SUM(bs.Runs_Scored)
    FROM Batsman_Scored bs
    WHERE bs.Match_Id IN (
      SELECT Match_Id FROM Match WHERE Season_Id = s.Season_Id
    )
    AND bs.Innings_No IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT Innings_No FROM Ball_by_Ball WHERE Match_Id IN (
        SELECT Match_Id FROM Match WHERE Season_Id = s.Season_Id
      )
    )
    AND bs.Match_Id = m.Match_Id
    AND bs.Runs_Scored IS NOT NULL
  ) >= 315

records.question: Which matches played on 2016-04-25 at Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium had a win margin of at most 25, occurred in seasons up to 2016 with purple cap holders taking at least 299 wickets and orange cap holders scoring exactly 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.season_year <= 2016 AND match.win_margin <= 25.0 AND match.match_date = '2016-04-25' AND venue.venue_name = 'Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium' AND season.purple_cap >= 299 AND season.orange_cap = 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.Match_Id
FROM Match
JOIN Venue ON Match.Venue_Id = Venue.Venue_Id
JOIN Season ON Match.Season_Id = Season.Season_Id
WHERE Match.Match_Date = '2016-04-25'
  AND Venue.Venue_Name = 'Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium'
  AND Match.Win_Margin <= 25
  AND Season.Season_Year <= 2016
  AND Season.Purple_Cap IN (
    SELECT Player_Id
    FROM Player
    WHERE Player_Id = Season.Purple_Cap
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM Ball_by_Ball
      WHERE Bowler = Season.Purple_Cap
      GROUP BY Bowler
      HAVING COUNT(*) >= 299
    )
  )
  AND Season.Orange_Cap IN (
    SELECT Player_Id
    FROM Player
    WHERE Player_Id = Season.Orange_Cap
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM Batsman_Scored
      WHERE Match_Id IN (
        SELECT Match_Id FROM Match WHERE Season_Id = Season.Season_Id
      )
      AND Innings_No IN (1,2)
      AND Runs_Scored = 8
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM Ball_by_Ball
        WHERE Striker = Season.Orange_Cap
      )
    )
  )
